summary: Cross-repo triage run. Merged kernel EM report (#1169) and analytics PR #31. Closed superseded analytics #29. PR #1153 (heredoc false-positive fix) remains blocked on rebase + CI. Version drift: agentguard-cloud 4 versions behind (2.8.0 vs 2.8.4). Recurring dogfood false-positive pattern ($(date) command substitution) needs matchers fix to land.

details.title: fix(matchers): strip heredoc bodies before destructive pattern scanning
chore(hq): EM report 2026-03-28T06:00
details.note: Previous EM run; superseded by this report

details.title: feat(dashboard): outcome filter + high-risk allows quick filter
fix: wire development_artifacts pipeline and per-pipeline error isolation
fix: wire development_artifacts pipeline + transaction rollback hardening

dogfoodPatterns.description: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) embedded in --body argument strings flagged as dangerous shell expansion. Affects multiple agents using gh pr comment with timestamps.
dogfoodPatterns.rootCause: matchers/command-scanner does not exempt read-only, side-effect-free substitutions like $(date) when inside --body string literals
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Escalate to kernel squad to unblock and rebase #1153

dogfoodPatterns.description: Multiple agents (onboarding-monitor-agent, pr-merger-agent, cloud-qa-smoke-runner, office-sim-qa) report version as 'unknown' in governance denial telemetry. Driver consistently shows 'copilot'.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Agents should read agentguard version at startup and register it; likely missing --agent-version flag or VERSION file in copilot CLI hooks

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: agentguard policy suggest redirects to cloud silently
dogfoodPatterns.description: policy suggest command silently redirects to cloud instead of running local analysis when no cloud token is present. Blocks onboarding dry runs.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Assign to DX squad: add --local flag or fallback message with clear guidance
